name: Happy Color Links
short_description: An adorable sokoban puzzle game , where you link shapes of the same color to together to make them happy
detailed_description:
Happy Color Links is an adorable Sokoban puzzle game where you link shapes of the same color together to make them happy.

The game features over 75 handcrafted puzzles, divided into maps that function like small open worlds.

Explore multiple interesting mechanics, including squares, circles, triangles, multipliers (producers), color splashes, power loops, and more.

Choose the world you want to visit from the lab and unlock new worlds by gathering black gems from previous worlds by solving puzzles.

You can undo moves and undo puzzles through reset (undo each puzzle individually), ensuring a smooth gameplay experience.

The final world is a unique small meta world where you use resets and move shapes from one level to another to solve puzzles.

Enjoy talking to quirky characters when you need a break from puzzling; they can be quite funny at times.

Hope you have fun!
